ksa_text: Manage data management systems and infrastructure, including data requirements definition, standards implementation, data administration, test data management, database management, and data governance policies.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of program protection planning to include information technology (IT) supply chain security/risk management policies, anti-tampering techniques, and requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Applying statistical and analytical tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-005 (OP, Task) maps to Financial Risk Specialist scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4733 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.473, eu_ai_act=0.438, ddat=0.438. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4733 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-005 (OP, composite 0.4733) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles does not surface this OP-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4733 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for OP domain content at composite 0.4733 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4733, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
